# Abid Azam Khan - Portfolio

## Overview
Senior Software Engineer and CEO of UNIPIXER with over 10 years of experience. Expert in full-stack web, mobile, and desktop application development.

## Core Technologies
- **Front-End**: React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript.
- **Back-End**: Node.js, C# ASP.NET, Laravel.
- **Mobile/Desktop**: React Native, Flutter, Electron.js.
- **Databases**: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB.

## Professional Experience
- **UNIPIXER**: Founder & CEO (2026-Present).
- **Upwork**: Top Rated Full Stack Developer.
- **Firefly**: System Architect.
- **Window IT Solution**: Programmer.

## How to work together
For new client inquiries and contracts, I use **Upwork** (Top Rated).

## Projects & Expertise
Specializes in high-performance, secure, and scalable applications. Experienced in architecting globally distributed systems and custom automation scripting.
